title: GST/HST rebate – Lease of land for residential purposes - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Lease of land for residential purposes
Form GST189 – Reason code 9
Reason code 9 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid on a lease of land for residential purposes ( subsection 256.1(1 ) of the Excise Tax Act ).
GST/HST Memorandum 19-3-5 , Rebate to Owner of Land Leased for Residential Use

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
